description_long: This triumphal arch features a classic architectural design with two robust columns supporting a prominent, rounded archway. The columns are set on wide, square bases, giving the structure a sense of stability and grandeur. The arch itself is accentuated by a layered molding that follows the curve, adding depth and visual interest. The color palette consists of warm beige and brown tones, suggesting a stone or concrete construction. There are no visible decorative reliefs, sculptures, or inscription panels, giving the arch a clean and minimalist appearance. The open central passage allows for easy traversal beneath the arch, making it suitable as a ceremonial or decorative gateway in an urban environment.
description: A grand, minimalist triumphal arch with two sturdy columns and a rounded archway in beige and brown tones, featuring clean lines and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full archway, both columns, and the layered molding detail.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the columns and the thickness of the arch structure.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the archway and columns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, highlighting the column depth and arch thickness.
